mismatches.recommendation: Switch import to firebase-functions and type callable context.

mismatches.expected: Exports match index.ts names: affiliatePostbackWebhook, checkDeviceFingerprint, manageHeroApproval, verifyAndProcessPayment
mismatches.impact: deployment/operator confusion, local invoke mismatch risk
mismatches.recommendation: Regenerate or remove stale root index.js; use functions/lib/index.js from tsc output.

mismatches.actual: registerDevice declared in source but not exported
mismatches.recommendation: Add `export { registerDevice } from './checkDeviceFingerprint';` if required by app flow.

mismatches.expected: invoke verifyAndProcessPayment cloud function in production path
mismatches.actual: httpsCallable call commented out; local Firestore simulation used
mismatches.impact: security parity gap vs server-enforced daily limit logic
mismatches.recommendation: Enable FirebaseFunctions callable path and keep simulation only behind debug flag.

mismatches.impact: anti-fraud controls diverge from backend callable behavior
mismatches.recommendation: Replace local check with cloud callable invocation and fallback policy.

mismatches.impact: Request/Response members unresolved in onRequest handlers
mismatches.recommendation: Remove `types: []` or include required type packages explicitly.
